# Security Policy

## Supported Versions

AgriTrust is under active development for the Casper Agentic Buildathon.

| Version | Supported |
|---------|-----------|
| latest main | ✅ |

## Reporting a Vulnerability

If you discover a security vulnerability, please email **ubongnt@gmail.com**.

Do NOT open a public GitHub issue. We will respond within 48 hours and credit responsible disclosure.
